Breadcrumb

  1. Home
  2. Officials

Officials

Calhoun County is governed by a five member council.  Each member is of council is elected from their district and a chairperson is chosen at the first meeting in January of each year.  In addition we have five other elected officials - Sheriff, Auditor, Coroner, Treasurer, and Clerk of Court.

County Council

Council MemberPositionDistrict
James Haigler
